codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the earlier readiness-scan coverage gap: Knip no longer blanket-ignores App Router entrypoints or the shared menu section component, JSCpd no longer excludes the privacy and terms pages, and the only real duplicate surfaced by that broader coverage was removed by extracting a shared alternating-section component.

summary: Pass: commit 3215ab4 meaningfully tightens Knip and JSCpd coverage for major app surfaces, removes the previously masked privacy/terms duplication via a shared component, and adequately addresses the earlier readiness-scan coverage concern.
